semantic_blueprint.root_cause_hypothesis: The vulnerability arises from inaccurate memory usage estimation of document updates and inserts, which can lead to resource exhaustion or denial of service due to under-accounting of the full document size when loaded from disk.
semantic_blueprint.fix_logic: Introduce a new parameter 'fullDocSizeEstimate' representing the expected full document size in bytes when loaded from disk, and incorporate this estimate into memory usage calculations for update and insert operations, ensuring more accurate resource accounting and preventing underestimation of memory usage.
semantic_blueprint.patch_intent_summary: Enhance memory usage estimation for document upsert operations by including the full document size estimate to prevent resource under-accounting.
